zh.lifeSummary: 當Geoffrey de Turville於大約1099年出生在法國豪-諾門迪艾朋吉奧德莫時，他的父親Roger de Turville FitzAnschitil31歲，母親Margeret de Warbeton22歲。他於1150年之前與Gundred Unknown結婚。他們至少是4個兒子的父母。他去世於大約1146年在英國英格蘭巴金哈姆爾韋斯頓 圖維爾享年49歲。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Turville
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Surrey and Hampshire; of Norman origin):
habitational name from Tourville‐la‐Campagne (Eure, France). The placename derives from the Old Norse personal name Thórr + Old French ville ‘farmstead, estate’ (from Latin villa).
occasionally a shortened form of   Turberville  .

variants.name: Turberville
meanings: English (of Norman origin): habitational name, probably from Thouberville (Eure), or possibly from Trubleville (Seine-Maritime), both in France. The two may have been confused in surname usage.

variants.name: Tourville
meanings: French: habitational name from Tourville, the name of several places mainly in the north of France (see   Turville   1). This surname is very rare in France. Compare   Courville   2.

History: In North America, this surname was originally a secondary surname or dit (‘also called’) name, borne by Augustin Hubou dit Tourville, a grandson of Mathieu Hubou dit Deslongchamps from France (see Deslongchamps ).

variants.name: Turvey
meanings: English (Northamptonshire, Bedfordshire and Buckinghamshire): habitational name from Turvey, a place in Bedfordshire named from Old English turf ‘turf’ + ēg ‘island’. This name may have become confused with Turville .

nameMeanings.name: Geoffrey
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Of Germanic (Frankish and Lombard) origin, introduced to Britain by the Normans. It was in regular use among the counts of Anjou, ancestors of the English royal house of Plantagenet, who were descended from Geoffrey Plantagenet, Count of Anjou ( 1113–51 ). It was a particularly popular name in England and France in the later Middle Ages; notable bearers in England include the poet Geoffrey Chaucer ( c.1340–1400 ) and in Wales the chronicler Geoffrey of Monmouth ( d. 1155 ). The original form and meaning of the name is disputed. According to one theory, it is merely a variant of Godfrey ; others derive the first part from the Germanic word gawia ‘territory’, walah ‘stranger’, or gisil ‘pledge’. Medieval forms can be found to support all these theories, and it is possible that several names have fallen together, or that the name was subjected to reanalysis by folk etymology at an early date.

historicEvents.title: The Battle of Tichebray
historicEvents.description: King Henry I defeated and captured his brother, Robert of Normandy, at the Battle of Tinchebray in 1106. Robert remained in captivity until his death in 1134.

en.lifeSummary: When Geoffrey de Turville was born about 1099, in Pont-Audemer, Eure, Upper Normandy, France, his father, Roger de Turville FitzAnschitil, was 31 and his mother, Margeret de Warbeton, was 22. He married Gundred Unknown before 1150. They were the parents of at least 4 sons. He died about 1146, in Weston Turville, Buckinghamshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 49.

Il a épousé Gundred Unknown avant 1150. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils. Il est décédé environ 1146, à Weston Turville, Buckinghamshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 49 ans.

ko.lifeSummary: Geoffrey de Turville(이)가 대략 1099년 프랑스 하테-노먼디 우르 폰트-오데머에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Roger de Turville FitzAnschitil(은)는 31세였고, 그의 어머니 Margeret de Warbeton(은)는 22세였다. 그는 1150년 이전 Gundred Unknown(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 대략 1146년 영국 잉글랜드 벅잉함실르 웨스턴 터르빌에서 49세의 나이로 사망했다.
